title: After the Victoria Mile: The View Everyone Awaits

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text: Wooow…!! Buena's run was incredible…!

text_block_list.name: Man B
text_block_list.text: I know, right!? You could feel her giving absolutely everything she had in that final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text: She's so petite and adorable, but she's a real athlete… So cool…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Phew… Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Everyone's faces are glowing. I hope they enjoyed it…)

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: …So, what do you think she'll show us next?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: We already know how incredible she is on the Tiara campaign! Now I want to see her take on the strongest racers from every generation!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Exactly! I want Buena Vista to prove that she's the face of this era! She has to run the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text: That race would be even more amazing than today, wouldn't it!? I can't wait!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Right, the next race…! They're already dreaming even bigger for me…!)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (…Yeah. That makes me really happy.)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Everyone's expecting even more from me! All right, I'll do my best again!)

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …Is that truly enough?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Desire…?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: I've received an ominous revelation. That, somewhere ahead… you'll wander into a deep forest.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: You've always turned people's expectations into strength… There can be no doubt about that light.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: But… the trees of a deep forest let no light through. Bottomless darkness… can swallow even the strongest heart.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Thank you. You're worried about me, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: But I'll be okay. For me, the cheers of the crowd are… the strongest wind of all.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: The stronger they become, the farther they carry me forward. Those voices mean everything to me!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …Yes. Perhaps I was overstepping.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: You're like a saint within this world. No matter how deep the shadows, you would simply shine through them.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: But even so… you still came to warn me. That's because you're a very kind person.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Desire. From here on, I want to answer even more people's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: So… would you let me carry yours too?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: Huh…?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You've always seen me as the trial you needed to overcome. So I want to keep answering your feelings too.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'll keep becoming the rival you deserve. So… will you keep believing in me?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: And someday… take me to your world too!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: Buena…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …Thank you. May the Saint's blessing guide your path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After the race, Buena Vista's expression is bright. She's already looking ahead, filled with excitement for what's next.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: So, about our next race…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I want to answer everyone's expectations even more. That's why I want to run in the race everyone is hoping for…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: The other Grand Prix race: The Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Takarazuka Kinen, like the Arima Kinen, is a Grand Prix race where fans' dreams come together. Surely, if she wins this race…
choice_data_list: It'd be a clear way to fulfill those expetations.
It'd be a clear way to fulfill those expetations.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Right? Then it's settled!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And just like that, our next goal becomes the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Now then! I wonder if the reporters will be here soon.
choice_data_list: …How about you skip the interviews today and head home?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Huh? But…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's just my imagination… but Buena seems more tired than usual today. I'd rather let her get some rest as soon as possible.
choice_data_list: Leave it to your super popular trainer.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah… Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: All right! Tell me everything you talked about later, okay?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (…That's what I said… but somehow I can't quite settle down.)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Maybe I'll go look over race footage. Somewhere nice and quiet…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Hmm, I wonder if there's anyone around?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: You again?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Nakayama…? Oh, do you have some business at the Ritto dorm?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Huh? …This is the Miho dorm.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat!? I-I…

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Getting lost this badly, that's almost a talent.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: …Whatever. You're running in the Takarazuka Kinen too, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: A Grand Prix race is exactly where the Heroine of the Era ought to be.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Um… You said "too," that means…

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Heh… I can't wait to turn an entire stadium painted in Buena Vista's colors upside down.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: …I'll pretend I never saw this. Now, why don't you get back already, little lady?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll see you at Hanshin Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (…Sigh. Going to the wrong dorm… I'm such a scatterbrain…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …I'd better keep this a secret from Trainer.
